title: In this Schedule, unless the context otherwise requires—
content:
lock-out (閉廠) and strike (罷工), respectively, have the meanings 
assigned to them in the Trade Unions Ordinance (Cap. 332);
week (星期) means a week ending with Saturday.
(Amended 5 of 1970 s. 9; 71 of 1970 s. 6; 41 of 1990 s. 23)
Last updated date
17.6.2022
